original: You stop in your tracks, holding your stomach with both hands. A burning feeling rises up your throat as bile rises up into your mouth. You hold one hand against your throat as you swallow your stomach acid back down. You wipe the water from your eyes as the sensation passes, leaving you confused and worried; hopefully you haven't eaten something bad.
You stumble and hold your hands against your belly as pain makes you double over. Nausea rises up your throat, and you feel the urge to throw up.

You wipe your eyes clean as you gasp for breath, the bitter taste of bile in your mouth. You take your codex and point it at yourself, scanning yourself to figure out what's wrong.
						
						It doesn't take long for the codex to tell you what's going on with your body. You're pregnant, and it's detecting other DNA in your system. Kui-tan to be exact
\t\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t\tYou're not really surprised. You remember the kui-tan who creampied you not too long ago. They're most likely the sire of the life growing inside your womb.\n\t\t\t\t\t\t

You're constantly hungry, finding yourself snacking on something almost nonstop. Even now, your stomach grumbles at you, demanding more sustenance. Thankfully, you're eating for two, so you don't need to worry about putting on more weight.\n\t\t\t\t\t\t

You gasp suddenly as the pup in your womb suddenly kicks. You hold your hand against your pregnant belly, getting a warm and content feeling in your heart as you feel it kick again, the life growing steadily inside you.

Your stomach grows larger by the day, making more space for the developing kui-tan pup inside you. Your [pc.skinFurScales] are drawn tight, and your walking is slowed down by your pregnant gut, making it harder to get around. Your [pc.pussy] is sopping wet, the pregnant hormones driving your lust up the wall, making you constantly think about a dick splitting your slit open.

You have to take it slow now that your belly is rounded and swollen, making you walk with a gait. Your [pc.chest] is also incredibly sensitive, making you shudder if the fabric or even wind brushes over them.\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t\t[pc.isLactating|Your breasts are leaking more milk than before, the hormones making you produce more food for your offspring.|You've started to leak milk, the hormones racing through you preparing you to feed your offspring.] The constant leaking of [pc.milk] making it even harder for you to wear anything over your chest

There's no end in sight for the growth of your stomach, stretching to make more room for the child growing inside you. You feel bloated and sluggish all the time from the size of your pup, but you're happy, the constant kicking and shifting of your unborn child reassuring you. You run your hand over your rounded stomach, settling your kid down for a moment. \n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEven without thinking, you find yourself rubbing your belly, basking in the bliss of the new life growing inside you. It's wonderful knowing that you're going to be bringing a new kui-tan to this world soon.

You have to take breaks just to catch your breath, lugging around a massive pregnant belly isn't easy. You run your hand over your [pc.skinFurScales], soothing down the now-eagerly wriggling child inside you. Why do unborn kids have so much energy? You idly wonder as you feel another soft kick coming from it. After a while of resting, you feel ready to move on again.\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t\tThe hormones right now are going wild, your pussy is constantly slavering, desperate for cum and creampies. In any idle moments you're fantasizing about big, fat, fuzzy kui-tan balls.

Your pregnancy is nearing its end, the moment of birth coming closer. According to your codex, it should last around two weeks at most. Your child is also eager to be born, almost constantly shifting around in your womb.

[var0|You make haste to your room, your codex alerting you that you're giving birth. Thankfully, your ship is equipped with a med bot that quickly comes to your aid.|[var1|Flushed at the timing you make your way as fast as you can to a bathroom, the med-kit bot at the wall automatically activates as you get in a stall and lock the door.|You curse at yourself for not making yourself stay at a safe place, but it's too late now. You quickly find a place that's as safe as it can be out here. You lay down on the ground and get ready for the oncoming child.]]
		
	The next several hours pass in a blur, at times seconds feeling like hours and other minutes passing in a blink of an eye. By the end of it, you're red in the face and your body is still aching with tears running down your face, but you have a newborn kui-tan pup in your lap. You bring the small mewling child to your [pc.chest], your child eagerly drinking deeply from your chest.
	
	You brush their still damp fur, sliding a finger over their cheek. It's small hand grabs around your finger, holding tight, making "," coo. You'd love to play with your child more, you have to get them to the nursery, and the bot is already on its way. You play and nuzzle with them as much you can in the little time you have, and all too soon, the bot arrives. You place your child inside the protective chamber of it, and give "," a gentle kiss on the forehead before the robot takes off, making you hug your chest tightly, the irrational feeling of abandoning your child tearing at your heart, but they're safe in the nursery, and you can't wait to go see them there."])),t===_Me.d.MALE?"him":"her",t===_Me.d.MALE?"him":"her"),[function(){return InShipInterior()},function(){return InRoomWithFlag(r.tb.PUBLIC)}]

Pain in your gut bends you over and fluid spills
into your [pc.lowerUndergarment]
onto the deck
onto the ground
. Alarm grips you as you feel your cervix dilate. With as much calm as you can muster, you consider the best course of action.
As quickly as you can, you waddle into your room, switch the auto-medkit on in the bathroom, carefully place yourself on the bed
, rip off your [pc.gear]
and spread your [pc.thighs], biological imperative virtually ordering you what to do.

As quickly as you can, you waddle into the nearest restroom, grab the medkit drone off the wall (frontier bathrooms are thankfully readily equipped for this sort of thing), lock yourself in a cubicle and spread your [pc.thighs], biological imperative virtually ordering you what to do.

Groaning at the timing, you shed your [pc.gear] and position yourself the best you can in the inhospitable and non-hospital-able terrain. The wish that you’d stayed somewhere indoors and safe hums through your thoughts like a mosquito, but there’s no helping it now -- you’ll have to deliver on your own.
The medkit drone monitors your pulse and places a large sheet beneath your thighs, instructing you to bear down rhythmically with soft, wordless beeps.

Spasms wrack your pregnant body for the next hour, and your mind almost shuts down from the pain, operating on biological autopilot. There’s no relief when the first baby finally emerges via one gigantic clench, wailing heartily, none at all - because you know, from the weight and wriggling in your womb, that that’s simply one of two.
The drone hovers down, snipping the umbilical cord and cradling the child to one side whilst you grit your teeth and bear down again.
You grit your teeth and bear down again.

At long last, in a sweaty daze of utter exhaustion, you’re looking down at your two, tiny children, curled up in your arms "+(pc.isLactating()?"nursing hungrily on your [pc.boobs]":"and blinking suspiciously at the world they’ve found themselves in")+". If you didn’t already know from the fact they’re twins, what they are is obvious from their floppy, isosceles ears and short, fluffy tails, twitching spasmodically as they "+(pc.isLactating()?"feed on their mother’s milk":"gaze around")+". Half-ausar puppies!
They’re both boys, their facial features a mirror image of each other.

You spend a little time with them, cleaning them and playing with their cute pointed toes and brushing their nascent fur, drawing little whinnies and whines out of them, tiny paw-hands touching your face. Eventually, though, reality intrudes. With a heavy heart, you call up the incubation drone, which arrives altogether too fast, and carefully load the pair of them up. You watch the shuttle disappear, comforting yourself with the knowledge that you’ll be able to see them again soon at the Nursery.
